conditions.description: Master Arm switch must be ARM
conditions.fix_instruction: Set Master Arm switch to ARM on the instrument panel.

conditions.description: A/A master mode must be selected
conditions.fix_instruction: Press the A/A master mode button on the instrument panel.

conditions.description: AIM-120C must be the selected weapon on SMS
conditions.fix_instruction: Select AIM-120C on the SMS DDI page.

conditions.description: Radar must be powered and operating — not in STBY or OFF
conditions.fix_instruction: Power the radar — select RWS, TWS, or STT mode on the radar switch.

conditions.description: Radar should be in STT or TWS for continuous uplink to the missile
conditions.fix_instruction: Radar is in RWS — lock the target in STT for a single-target shot, or use TWS for multi-target employment.

conditions.description: Master Arm switch must be ARM
conditions.fix_instruction: Set Master Arm to ARM on the instrument panel.

conditions.description: A/G master mode must be selected
conditions.fix_instruction: Press the A/G master mode button on the instrument panel.

conditions.description: GBU-12 must be selected on SMS
conditions.fix_instruction: Select GBU-12 on the SMS DDI page.

conditions.description: TGP must be powered and operational for laser guidance
conditions.fix_instruction: Power the TGP on a DDI — select FLIR/TPOD and wait for OPR mode.

conditions.description: TGP must have an active designation in TRACK mode
conditions.fix_instruction: Designate the target in the TGP DDI — slew crosshairs and TDC depress to enter TRACK mode.

conditions.description: Laser Arm switch should be ARM before reaching the release point
conditions.fix_instruction: Set Laser Arm switch to ARM on the Master Arm panel — it is separate from Master Arm.

conditions.description: Altitude should be above minimum safe release altitude for fuze arming
conditions.fix_instruction: You may be below 1500 ft AGL — GBU-12 fuze may not arm. Climb or abort the run.
